intro: Tolumnia moiriana, also known as Moir's Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to exhibit various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory infections.
